question:
Will Sport Lisboa e Benfica vs. Casa Pia AC end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 9, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.ligaportugal.pt/

evidences.title: Week One Liga Portugal schedule announced – Benfica opener postponed - portugoal.net
evidences.content: portugoal.net portugoal.net portugoal.net portugoal.net Portuguese Football in English # Week One Liga Portugal schedule announced – Benfica opener postponed Excitement is building as we near the big kick-off of the Liga Portugal 2025/26 season, although in terms of their league debut Benfica and Rio Ave fans will have to be a little more patient. Champions Sporting get the ball rolling on Friday August 8th (8.15pm kick-off) as they begin their quest for a third straight league title away at Casa Pia. Although the two clubs are Lisbon neighbours, the match will be played 80 km north of the capital, given that the Gansos are still renovating their stadium and will continue to play their home matches at the Rio Maior Municipal Stadium. [...] Benfica’s match at home to Rio Ave has been postponed as it falls in between the two legs of the Eagles’ Champions League qualifier against Nice. The match has provisionally been put back to September 23rd, although that date is subject to confirmation. ## Full Jornada One programme: Friday, 8 August: Casa Pia – Sporting, 8.15pm Saturday, 9 August: Nacional – Gil Vicente, 3.30pm FC Porto – Vitória SC, 8.30pm Arouca – AVS, 6.00pm Sunday, 10 Aug...

evidences.title: Benfica José Mourinho Presentation Coach - SL Benfica
evidences.content: "Words are sometimes carried away by the wind. Attitudes are not. And the promise is very clear: I will live for Benfica, I will live for my mission. I left home and said ‘see you on Sunday’ [smiles]. That means that until Sunday, I'm not leaving here. And I think it's a tremendous honor that my experience helps me control my emotions. And I would appreciate it if we could keep this short, because we have a game in 48 hours, and I think that for the Benfica nation, there is nothing more important than the game we have in about 48 hours", added José Mourinho. PRESS CONFERENCE President Rui Costa also mentioned recently, as he did at the press conference, that Benfica's next coach must have a winning profile. We all know your record. In that sense, how are you going to make Benfica win? [...] field. I have enormous respect for my job, I have enormous respect for my club's fans. We won't always win. We can't lose like we did two days ago. That's not Benfica. Benfica is the team that played against Fenerbahçe for 30 minutes, Benfica is the team that was in Istanbul struggling to play with 10 men and managed to steer the ship to safety and get a positive result. That's the Benfica I...

evidences.title: International Match Calendars - Inside FIFA
evidences.content: FIFA # International Match Calendars After consultation with the relevant stakeholders, FIFA publishes the International Match Calendar (IMC) for the period of four or eight years. FIFA’s objective in this process is to make a football calendar that is “fit-for-purpose” for modern needs, contributing for the improvement of the quality of players, clubs and national teams and giving both incentive and opportunity for the detection and development of talent outside a small number of countries.
